Built with Claude · Life Sciences 2026
Perturbation biology · adaptive-depth halting

When Does a Perturbation Model
Know Enough?

Repurposing a model's learned halting depth as a reproducible, effect-size-independent readout of perturbation response complexity — and testing, honestly, where it holds and where it breaks.

Yash Raj Frozen STATE foundation model Replogle × 4 lines + CD4⁺ T cells Researcher Track
github.com/yashraj59/RefineRx  ·  huggingface.co/yraj/RefineRx
?
The problem

One endpoint. Two very different mechanisms. Same magnitude.

Perturb-seq measures a single control-vs-perturbed endpoint. But two perturbations of completely different mechanistic complexity — a direct hit vs. a long regulatory cascade — can land at responses of identical size.

Effect size can't tell them apart. Is there a signal for how much "work" a response really takes — one we can recover from the endpoint we already collect?

The idea

Repurpose adaptive-computation halting as a measurement, not a stop rule.

Originally: save compute

ACT / PonderNet let an easy input exit early and a hard one ponder longer — to spend fewer FLOPs.

Here: a probe

On a frozen backbone whose 8 layers always execute, halting saves no compute. The layer where the endpoint estimate converges is the readout.

E[N] = refinement depth

A per-perturbation proxy for response complexity — explicitly not biological time or causal depth, which one endpoint can't recover.

First time, to our knowledge, ACT halting is read as a biological measurement on a perturbation-response model.

The negatives that shaped the method

An identifiability wall: every graft we controlled collapsed.

  • scDiff + PonderNet → depth constant, then an effect-size proxy (ρ=−0.70)
  • TxPert adaptive-hops → reproducible but effect-size proxy (ρ=−0.84)
  • Our magnitude-free refiner → non-redundant but irreproducible (ρ=0.14)
  • Fixed STRING cascade → reproducible, but a graph statistic, not model depth
  • Frozen pretrained STATE → the useful corner: reproducible and effect-independent

The two-corner test

Reproducible & effect-independent

A free learned gate over an expressive predictor always collapses to a per-seed constant. The negatives are the finding — and they motivated every design choice.

The method · AdaptiveStateRefine

How the model reads depth off a frozen backbone.

Frozen STATE

8 transformer layers — all execute on every perturbation.

→

+ Refinement token

A learnable per-perturbation probe appended to the cell sentence.

→

Logit-lens decode

Read each layer through the frozen head → a per-round endpoint estimate.

→

LayerNorm halt head

Hazard λk = σ(ℓk) at each round; last round forced to stop.

→

E[N]

Stop-mass-weighted expected exit round — the depth signature.

Three choices make it work where the naive gate collapsed:

A per-perturbation probe

Supplies the signal a free gate never had — the token's hidden state varies across perturbations (cosine 0.80–0.83).

An unsaturated gate

Without LayerNorm the halt logits (std ≈ 100) saturate to 0/1 and depth collapses; with it, halt confidence is a genuine 0.28.

Oracle + magnitude-free target

A per-perturbation oracle round makes depth reproducible; a magnitude-free target keeps it from becoming an effect-size proxy.

All eight layers always run, so halting saves no compute — E[N] is read as a measurement, not a stop rule.

The working readout · discovery on K562 (968 perturbations)

A magnitude-free, oracle-supervised halt head clears both gates.

  • Reproducible — split-half ρ = 0.76
  • Effect-independent — partial ρ = −0.04 (controlling #DE, cell count)
  • Recovers its oracle target ρ = 0.61; spreads over 70% of the round budget
  • Same construction clears both gates on all four Replogle lines — within-line mean ρ = 0.80 (K562, HepG2, Jurkat, RPE1)
  • A naive learned gate → per-seed constant (no structure at all)

The signature exists only with the oracle scaffold — a probe token, an unsaturated gate, and a magnitude-free target. A free gate never discovers it.

Where it reproduces — and where it does not · all four Replogle lines

Strong within a context. Gone across contexts.

  • Validated on all four lines (K562, HepG2, Jurkat, RPE1) — within-line split-half ρ = 0.76–0.85, mean 0.80
  • Cross-line ρ = 0.14 · cross-donor ρ = 0.06 — the ranking does not port between contexts

A three-tier decay as the source of variation moves from the halt head to the biology: reseed the head 0.93 → retrain the backbone 0.29 → change donor / cell type 0.06. Depth is a cell-type-specific property — not a portable invariant.

Application · primary CD4⁺ T cells (Marson/Pritchard GWCD4i)

Suppressors that spare resting cells converge faster.

Single-cell, two donors, three activation states. The Part-2 question: do inflammatory-program suppressors carry a distinct refinement signature?

Resting
ρ 0.62
Stim 8 h
ρ 0.68
Stim 48 h
ρ 0.75
  • Resting-sparing suppressors are shallower than damaging (δ=−0.16) & generic (δ=−0.24), Kruskal p = 5×10⁻²⁸
  • Ports across donors only at the 48 h endpoint (ρ 0→0.49) — exactly where the biology converges
What the readout organizes

Depth clusters organize druggability — and it's genuinely new.

  • Approved/clinical drug targets concentrate in the translation/ribosome depth cluster — OR 2.8–9.8 in every line (HepG2 38%, p = 6×10⁻¹⁴)
  • Toxicity & essentiality co-localize in the same stratum
  • Non-redundant with network topology: no graph statistic reproduces the E[N] ordering (best |ρ| = 0.23, below a 0.3 novelty ceiling)
  • Honest limit: no incremental lift over a purpose-built STRING classifier in 3/4 lines — task non-additivity, not descriptor redundancy
How Claude Science powered this

Survey → build → falsify at speed → release.

Survey first

A graftability catalog of 43 perturbation models, reading each repo to find where a halting loop could even be inserted — that pointed me at a frozen backbone.

Falsification-first

The identifiability wall across three model families, effect-size and network-topology baselines, cross-context tests — negatives cheap enough to become the contribution.

autocollect-bio

My own Claude Science skill: 11,526-gene zero-fabrication annotation, a source tag on every value, NOT_FOUND never guessed. Released as a standalone repo.

Claude Code processed the ~22 M-cell CD4 screen down to the single-cell substrate. Every number in the paper traces to a saved, versioned table.

The finding

A real property — with an honestly bounded reach.

The positive triad

  • Reproducible within a cell type (ρ = 0.80)
  • Effect-size-independent (partial ρ ≈ 0, all 4 lines)
  • Cell-type-specific — sign flips between lines

The negatives, stated plainly

  • Unidentifiable without the oracle scaffold
  • Does not port across cell types or donors
  • From-scratch on pseudobulk: fits response, depth collapses — reported as a limit

The negatives are the durable contribution. A falsification-first paper is only viable if negatives are cheap to run and impossible to fake.

Thank you

When a model knows enough is
a real, measurable — and local — property.
